name: MiniMax Coding Plan (minimax.io)

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The public MiniMax privacy policy says personal data will be retained only as long as reasonably required and then destroyed or de-identified when no longer required. No API- or Coding-Plan-specific retention schedule was found.
dataUsage.details: The publicly accessible policy located for MiniMax covers app/web services generally, not a Coding Plan/API-specific data usage addendum. Public API docs also show file upload and persistent/session memory features, but do not state whether API customer data is used for model training.

notes: MiniMax publicly provides a general privacy policy and cookie policy, including an EU representative, but no publicly accessible DPA/AVV, subprocessors list, EU-only residency option, SCC statement, or API-data-training statement was found in primary sources reviewed. Headquarters appears to be Singapore (Nanonoble Pte. Ltd.), which does not have an EU adequacy decision.
